idea-plugin.name: Scratchpad
idea-plugin.description:
Scratchpad brings fast, fuzzy file-reference autocomplete to your scratch files, plain-text notes, and Markdown documents. Type @ and start typing a filename to instantly search your entire project and insert a relative path — no copy-pasting required.

Features

  • Fuzzy file search — find any project file by typing a few characters after @
  • Instant trigger — autocomplete pops up the moment you type @, no shortcut needed
  • Scratch files, .txt & .md — works in the file types where you take notes and jot down references
  • All JetBrains IDEs — IntelliJ IDEA, WebStorm, PyCharm, GoLand, CLion, Rider, and more
  • Open files first — currently open files are prioritized at the top of results

How to use

  1. Open a scratch file (Ctrl+Shift+N / Cmd+Shift+N), .txt, or .md file
  2. Type @ followed by part of a filename
  3. Select a match from the completion popup to insert the relative path
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.0.0

  • Initial release
  • Fuzzy file-reference autocomplete triggered by @
  • Support for scratch files, .txt, and .md files
  • Open-file prioritization in completion results
